chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-318 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on M.A. 9065/2022 For orders on M.A. 9666/2022 14.10.2022 Surety present in person. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, the applicant/surety seeks return of surety papers furnished by him in this case. Learned A.P.G for the State after waiving notice of this application and going through the record has endorsed no objection for return of surety documents by stating that since the case has been decided and applicant has been acquitted by the trial court vide judgment dated 24.08.2022, the surety papers are no more required by this Court. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the office is directed to return the surety documents to the surety after proper verification and identification as per rules. JUDGE Ali Haider
